zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret of Sicily於1237年2月出生在義大利普格利亞霍治亞時，她的父親Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor42歲，母親Isabella of England23歲。她於1255年6月與Albrecht II von Thüringen在德國貝也史瓦本結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1270年8月8日在德國布藍登波格福藍福特 安 德 奧德享年33歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇福藍福特 阿姆 麥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret of Sicily于1237年2月出生在意大利普格利亞霍治亞时，她的父亲Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor42岁，母亲Isabella of England23岁。她于1255年6月与Albrecht II von Thüringen在德国貝也史瓦本结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1270年8月8日在德国布藍登波格福藍福特 安 德 奧德享年33岁，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇福藍福特 阿姆 麥。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret of Sicily was born in February 1237, in Foggia, Puglia, Italy, her father, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, was 42 and her mother, Isabella of England, was 23. She married Albrecht II von Thüringen in June 1255, in Swabia, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 8 August 1270, in Frankfurt an der Oder, Brandenburg, Germany, at the age of 33, and was buried in Frankfurt, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret of Sicily est née en février 1237, à Foggia, Puglia, Italie, son père, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Isabella of England, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Albrecht II von Thüringen en juin 1255, à Schwaben, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 août 1270, à Frankfurt an der Oder, Brandenburg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Frankfurt am Main, Saint-Empire romain.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret of Sicily im Februar 1237 in Foggia, Puglia, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor 42 und ihre Mutter Isabella of England 23. Sie hat im Juni 1255 in Schwaben, Bayern, Deutschland Albrecht II von Thüringen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. August 1270 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Frankfurt an der Oder, Brandenburg, Deutschland und wurde in Frankfurt am Main, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret of Sicily è nata il nel febbraio 1237 nel Foggia, Puglia, Italia, sua padre, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Isabella of England, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Albrecht II von Thüringen nel giugno 1255, nel Schwaben, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 agosto 1270, nel Frankfurt an der Oder, Brandenburg, Germania, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Frankfurt am Main, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret of Sicily(이)가 1237년 2월 이탈리아 푸그리야 포지아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella of England(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1255년 6월 독일 베이른 슈와벤에서 Albrecht II von Thüringen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1270년 8월 8일 독일 브랜덴버그 프랭k퍼트 앤 데르 오더에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 프랭k퍼트 아 맹에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret of Sicily nasceu em fevereiro de 1237, em Foggia, Puglia, Itália, seu pai, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Isabella of England, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Albrecht II von Thüringen em junho de 1255, em Schwaben, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1270, em Frankfurt an der Oder, Brandenburg, Alemanha, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Frankfurt am Main, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.Frankfort on the Oder, Frankfurt (Oder),: фрэнкфурт ан дир одир, брэнденбург, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret of Sicily родилась февраль 1237 г. в местности фогя, пугля, Италия, её отцу по имени Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella of England, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albrecht II von Thüringen июнь 1255 г. в местности щвабен, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 августа 1270 г. в местности фрэнкфурт ан дир одир, брэнденбург, Германия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности Франкфурт-на-Майне, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret of Sicily nació en febrero de 1237, en Foggia, Puglia, Italia, su papá, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Isabella of England, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Albrecht II von Thüringen en junio de 1255, en Schwaben, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1270, en Frankfurt an der Oder, Brandenburg, Alemania, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Frankfurt am Main, Heiliges Römisches Reich.
